structural_alternatives.summary: Independent vertical stack per feature/entity (own modules and copied flow).
Thin feature entrypoints call shared helpers without a single orchestrating spine.
One parameterized flow (stages + config/strategy per variant). Stack-agnostic — modules, workers, or a graph runtime may implement it later.

content.selection_rationale: Multiple near-identical capabilities share the same skeleton; only policies differ. Choose spine shape first; technology later.
evolutionary_rules: Second similar capability reuses approved seams or opens a design amendment.
Generalize only when at least two real uses share stable behaviour.
Dependency direction is enforced by .claude/project/boundaries.json sensors.
